summary: Pin reproducible stack runtimes and expose template setup state
description: Pin reproducible stack runtimes and expose template setup state
acceptance: Projects can declare a deterministic stack_ref in addition to a minimum compatible version
Template repositories report setup_required instead of ordinary unfinished project work
A local release preflight synchronizes versions and proves tests without publishing

evidence.summary: TDD: stack_ref and template-status tests failed before implementation and now pass. Full regression: 50 tests. Release preflight verified v0.2.0 synchronization and explicitly performed no publish. Doctor now reports required immutable ref compatibility.
